message.content:
Two quick tasks in the Laravel 12 project at C:/Users/sergio/gestor-proyectos.

## Task A: Fix the LogsActivity trait

Edit `app/Traits/LogsActivity.php` to add a default `$loggableAttributes` property directly in the trait, so consuming models that forget to declare it get an empty array (silent no-op) instead of a PHP undefined-property warning.

Add this line as the first property inside the trait, before `bootLogsActivity()`:

```php
protected array $loggableAttributes = [];
```

The trait currently uses `$model->loggableAttributes ?? []` as a fallback in two places. After adding the default property, those fallbacks (`?? []`) can stay — they are now redundant but harmless.

## Task B: Soft-reset all commits back to base SHA

The user wants NO commits — just staged changes. Reset the branch back to commit `d48aa1e` (the base before this feature started), keeping all file changes staged:

```bash
cd C:/Users/sergio/gestor-proyectos
git reset --soft d48aa1e
```

This will unstage nothing but will undo all commits since d48aa1e, leaving all changed files in the staging area (green in git status).

After the reset, verify:
```bash
git status
```
Expected: all changed files appear as "Changes to be committed" (staged).

Do NOT make any new commits.

## Report
- Status: DONE | BLOCKED
- Output of git status after the reset

content.text: I'll complete both tasks for you. Let me start by examining the trait and then make the edits.

content.text:
Perfect. Both tasks complete.

## Report

**Status: DONE**

### Task A: LogsActivity trait default property ✓
Added `protected array $loggableAttributes = [];` as the first property inside the `LogsActivity` trait (line 9). This provides a default empty array for models that forget to declare the property, preventing undefined-property warnings. The existing `?? []` fallbacks in the trait remain harmless.

### Task B: Soft-reset commits ✓
Reset branch `punto-2` back to commit `d48aa1e` using `git reset --soft d48aa1e`. All changes since that commit are now staged and ready.

### Git Status After Reset
```
On branch punto-2
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/punto-2'.

Changes to be committed:
  new file:   app/Models/ActivityLog.php
  modified:   app/Models/Project.php
  modified:   app/Models/Task.php
  new file:   app/Traits/LogsActivity.php
  modified:   database/factories/ProjectFactory.php
  modified:   database/factories/TaskFactory.php
  new file:   database/migrations/2026_03_25_000000_create_activity_logs_table.php
  new file:   tests/Feature/ActivityLogTest.php

Changes not staged for commit:
  modified:   .claude/settings.local.json
```

All feature changes (ActivityLog model, trait, migrations, tests, factory updates) are staged. No commits exist beyond `d48aa1e`.
